description: Live GitHub + WakaTime activity over the last 7 days.

data.summary: This week Ethan Qiu logged 4 hrs 16 mins of coding time, averaging 3 hrs 5 mins per day. His work was spread across 5 projects, with most time in TypeScript, followed by Other, Java, Markdown, and JSON. No GitHub commits, pull requests, or new repositories were recorded this week.
